subject: 5 Mystery Headliners... 1 Event... Free?
body:
Imagine sitting down in the same room with…

A service business owner so massive their Money Model defined an industry.

Or a professional services titan who scaled not one, but two billion dollar companies by having better money models than his competition.

Or a software entrepreneur who was able to beat VC backed competitors by outspending them because he had a better Money Model.

Among others…

What would you ask them?

How much would it cost to get into a room like this?

What would you learn that could change your business?

Most people would charge you $199 to $599 to profit from the ticket sales - just to see them speak.

I'm doing it FOR FREE

Even better, each speaker breaks down the Money Models that took them to the top of their game. (Hint: they've all got one, and they're all brutally effective).

If you even learn one small detail about their Money Models that you can apply to your business - it'll be worth it.

I wish I could say more…but I want it to be a surprise.

If you want to get this entire virtual event AT NO CHARGE…Register :)

And if you're already registered…show :)

Alex

PS - If you want to engage directly with them and submit questions live - upgrade to VIP by just preordering a single book.
